MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Conard House Incorporated is present. Represented by Trena Jones.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Margaret Duncan is present.
Attorney Michelle Lee representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of FEB-11-2013 is vacated.
